name: The Ashbound Witness
nature: Silent ember spirit that appears as drifting cinders in humanoid form.
role: Observes whether the wielder is worthy and whispers forgotten names.

name: Neris of the Deep Bell
nature: Water-veiled sentinel with a voice like distant cathedral chimes.
role: Stabilizes violent activations at a hidden personal cost.

name: The Fifth Lumen
nature: Radiant intelligence made of geometric light strata.
role: Projects cryptic future fragments when an artifact reaches peak output.
